calendar.matters:
CONTINUANCE CALENDAR FOR UD COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dolores Chong (415-438-7807) of Chong Law for 501 Columbs LLC, plaintiff and moving party / Suzanne K. Babb (707-547-2000) of Beyers Costin for Seyed Jalal Heydari, defendant and opposing party

Counsels and litigants confer with Judge Quidachay in chambers for settlement discussions.
The case settles. The terms of the settlement agreement are placed on the record. Plaintiff's counsel to reduce the terms of the settlement agreement to writing whcih the parties are to sign. If either party does not sign the written settlement agreement the settlement agreement is to be submitted to the court for review and signature. Once signed, the settlement will be binding on the parties. Court to retain jurisidiction for twenty-four (24) months pursuant to CCP 664.6.

Plaintiff to dismiss another non-payment lawsuit withing twenty (20) days of signing the settlement agreement is this case. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, CSR: Tara A. Lohman, #13428 (510-451-1580)

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Continued To Feb-27-13 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 501
